title: Young Jedi Knights: The Emperor's Plague
content:
{{Top|rwm|new|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:YoungJediKnights-TheEmperorsPlague.jpg]] |title=''Young Jedi Knights:
The Emperor's Plague'' |author=*[[Kevin J. Anderson]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' *[[Rebecca Moesta]] |cover artist=[[Dave Dorman]] |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Berkley Boulevard|Boulevard]]/[[Berkley Jam]] |early release= |release date=[[January]] [[1998]] |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages= |isbn=1-572-97331-5 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]] |series=''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Knights]]'' |preceded by=[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Bounty|''Jedi Bounty'']] |followed by=[[Young Jedi Knights: Return to Ord Mantell|''Return to Ord Mantell'']] }} '''''Young Jedi Knights: The Emperor's Plague''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] young-adult novel written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and [[Rebecca Moesta]]. It is the eleventh book in the ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Knights]]'' series, and it was first published by [[Berkley Boulevard]] in [[January]] [[1998]]. The novel was reprinted in ''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Fall of the Diversity Alliance]]'' ([[1998]]). ==Publisher's summary== '''Jacen and Jaina''' ''When the Galactic Empire died, they were born—a new hope for the New Republic. The young twins of Han Solo and Princess Leia have taken their first steps as Jedi Knights, defeating the evil minions of the Shadow Academy. Now, with their friends Tenel Ka and Lowbacca the Wookiee, the future heroes of an already legendary saga continue their training.'' ''Bornan Thul's secret is out: he's been protecting a deadly plague that could devastate the galaxy if released. And the evil Nolaa Tarkona—leader of the Diversity Alliance—knows where it is hidden.'' ''Now Jacen, Jaina and their allies must race against time. As a massive battle rages between New Republic soldiers and the forces of the Diversity Alliance, the young Jedi Knights must find and destroy the plague before it can be released.'' ''But they first must face Nolaa Tarkona. And her very lethal hired hand, Boba Fett''. ==Plot summary== [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] tracks [[Bornan Thul]]'s location and secures the coordinates to the [[Emperor's plague storehouse]] from Bornan's [[Computer/Legends|computer]], delivering the data to [[Nolaa Tarkona]]. She departs [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], destined for the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] arrive first, planting [[Explosive charge/Legends|explosives]] throughout the depot to destroy it. Inside is a huge variety of devastating plague [[Poison/Legends|toxins]]. Tarkona's forces arrive and begin defusing the [[Bomb/Legends|bombs]], forcing Bornan, [[Lowbacca]], [[Raynar Thul|Raynar]], the reprogrammed [[IG-88 assassin droid/Legends|IG-88]], and [[Zekk]] to destroy the plague samples themselves. Tarkona finds Bornan and subjects him to the human-targeting plague, [[Death/Legends|killing]] him. She is then infected herself by one of the plagues in the storehouse, and [[Raabakyysh|Raaba]], in a fit of consciousness, [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] her far from civilization so she cannot infect her foes. In [[Realspace/Legends|space]], the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic fleet]] shatters the [[Diversity Alliance]] [[Starship/Legends|vessels]], bringing an end to their terror.
